provenance.exempt: legacy-seed: band-6 port carries the shipped ordering/grouping as the seed arrangement (design-spec §9.3 confidence rule — telemetry sidecar is seeded-empty; the grouping/hub sims re-run post-telemetry)

legacy-seed: band-6 tournament port renders the shipped GAME_MODES move vocabulary in its shipped declaration order (the shipped match channels took TYPED moves — no shipped button arrangement exists to carry; the mode decides which declared subset renders). Telemetry sidecar is seeded-empty; the layout sims re-run post-telemetry (design-spec §9.3 confidence rule).
